## Checklist

- [ ] Code and comments are written in English
- [ ] New or substantially changed functions have concise English comments above them
- [ ] The change is modular and avoids growing large hotspot files unnecessarily
- [ ] No unrelated formatting changes are included
- [ ] Private, copyrighted, or client-owned show files are not included
